required_behavior: Map Protocol 775 Login clientbound packet id 0x02 to a packet shape that preserves the official minecraft:login_finished mapping.

Decode the official body shape from the generated answer: GameProfile id UUID, GameProfile name PLAYER_NAME stringUtf8(16), and GameProfile properties encoded by ByteBufCodecs.GAME_PROFILE_PROPERTIES.
Consume the full official body bytes for oracle/answers/775/login_finished_clientbound_framed_dispatch.answer.jsonl.
Expose the decoded id/name through the current Stevenarella LoginSuccess_UUID packet shape unless a narrower existing packet shape is already available.
Do not edit oracle answers or infer packet facts outside the generated official artifact.
stop_boundary: Implement only Protocol 775 Login clientbound minecraft:login_finished packet dispatch/body support needed for the exact oracle test. Do not implement login_compression, custom_query, cookie_request, authentication success, profile property semantics, Login-to-Configuration transition behavior, Configuration entry, Play readiness, or UI behavior.
